evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: **Alfanous** is a Quranic search engine API that provides simple and advanced search capabilities for the Holy Qur'an. It enables developers to build applications that search through Quranic text in Arabic, with support for Buckwalter transliteration, advanced query syntax, and rich metadata.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: * **Powerful Search**: Search Quranic verses with simple queries or advanced Boolean logic * **Arabic Support**: Full support for Arabic text and Buckwalter transliteration * **Rich Metadata**: Access verse information, translations, recitations, and linguistic data * **Flexible API**: Use as a Python library or RESTful web service * **Faceted Search**: Aggregate results by Sura, Juz, topics, and more * **Multiple Output Formats**: Customize output with different views and highlight styles

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: # Advanced search with options >>> api.do({"action": "search", "query": u"الله", "page": 1, "perpage": 10})

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: # Search using Buckwalter transliteration >>> api.do({"action": "search", "query": u"Allh"})

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: Or run your own web service locally (see [alfanous_webapi](src/alfanous_webapi/README.md)).

evidence.title: v1.3.7
evidence.excerpt: Release metadata available, release notes body is empty.

evidence.title: v1.3.6
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * Fix vocalizations search output to return list of strings instead of bare string by @Copilot in https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/pull/607 * Deduplicate recitations.json: keep only highest bitrate per author by @Copilot in https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/pull/609 * Fix show/translations returning stale/incomplete data with no human-readable names by @Copilot in https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/pull/611 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/compare/v1.3.5...v1.3.6

evidence.title: v1.3.5
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed * Add memory cache for search engines and json files by @Copilot in https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/pull/597 * Add keywords endpoint for field frequency and uniqueness queries with multi-unit support by @Copilot in https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/pull/595 * Fix `_search` method to handle "word" and "translation" units by @Copilot in https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/pull/605 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Alfanous-team/alfanous/compare/v1.3.4...v1.3.5
